note: 수집물: XP젬 소/중/대(16/20/24) + 회복 하트/포션(24) + 자석 아이템(24). natives로 산출물별 native 분리.

jobs.prompt: Pixel art collectible item sheet: exactly 6 collectible item sprites arranged in a single horizontal row, 6 equal-width columns, one item per column, generous empty magenta space between and around them, no drop shadows on the background. All drawn in identical style at the same drawn size: (1) a cyan XP gem crystal shaped like a classic faceted diamond with a bright top facet, (2) the exact same cyan faceted gem again, (3) the exact same cyan faceted gem a third time, (4) a shiny red heart with a white glossy highlight on the upper left, (5) a small round glass potion bottle with a brown cork stopper, filled with pink liquid and a glossy highlight, (6) a red U-shaped horseshoe magnet with silver-white tips and a tiny golden star badge on its curve.
